chunks.title: Deliverance and Praise
chunks.reason: The psalmist recounts God's rescue from the pit and declares the blessedness of trusting in Him.

chunks.title: Obedience and Proclamation
chunks.reason: A declaration of the psalmist's desire to do God's will and his public proclamation of righteousness.

chunks.title: Cry for Help and Deliverance
chunks.reason: The psalmist describes overwhelming evils and petitions God for swift rescue and vindication.
